summary: Planned conservative non-mutating classifications for five independent open PRs in a live inventory shard. No canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster, and no close, merge, fix, or security route action is safe from the hydrated artifact.

actions.reason: Independent open contributor PR with useful code and unresolved review/proof questions; no duplicate, superseded, low-signal, security, merge, or close action is supported.
Independent open contributor PR with supplied proof but conflict/maintainer-review blockers; no close action is permitted or justified.
Independent broad UI/i18n PR with unresolved proof/review concerns; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate from the hydrated artifact.
Independent open PR with useful focused bug-fix work but author/check blockers; no closure, merge, or fix action is allowed in this job.
Independent feature/API PR requiring maintainer product/API judgment; not security-sensitive and not safe to close as duplicate, superseded, fixed, or low-signal.
